title: Oru Kan Jaadai Lyrics Anjaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Movie :Anjaan
Song :Oru Kan Jaadai
Singers :Benny Dayal, Swetha Pandit
Lyricist :Viveka
Music: Yuvan

Oru kan jaadai seithaley
Manam panjaagum thannaley
Idaividaatha anbaley
Ennai venmegam seidhaley

Tharayil pogum megam ivala..
mayangi paartheney
Uyirin koocham podum aval seiyum
maayam oyadhey.

Vaanam endraal thalaikku melea
Irukkum endru ninaithirundhen.
Endhan vaanam ethiril nindru
Punnagaithaal mei marandhen.

Aasai ellam pootti vaithenea
Saavi undhan vizhigalilea
Anumadhikkum paarvai vandhalea
Alli kolven nimidathilea..

Ennalum vendumey
unnodu kaigal serthu
pogum nedupayanam.
Kaadhal ondru dhaan..
irudhi varai vazhum
vaazhvai arthamaakum .Okay

Thodarum potta kadhayai polea
Indha maalai mudigiradhey.
Undhan kangal paarkathaney
Enadhu kaalai vidigiradhey.

Vaaram yeazhu naalum unnalea
Vaanavillaai therigiradhea
Unnai kaana naatkkal ellamea
Karuppu vellai aagiradhey.

Minsaara thottamey
un meni pookum
pookal oru adhirchiyadi.
Kaadhal seiyalaam
Munbu nee paartha
mochai agumpadi..

Oru kan jaadai seithaley
Manam panjaagum thannaley
Idaividaatha anbaley
Ennai venmegam seidhaley

Tharayil pogum megam ivala..
mayangi paartheney
Uyirin koocham podum aval seiyum
maayam oyadhey.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oru Kan Jaadai'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the beauty of a fleeting glance that captures the heart.

What is the context of this song in the movie Anjaan?

In Anjaan, this song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of 'Oru Kan Jaadai'?

The song features the talented voices of Benny Dayal and Shweta Pandit.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Oru Kan Jaadai' was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique sound and style.

When was 'Oru Kan Jaadai' released?

The song was released on July 23, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kan Jaadai, the song encapsulates the essence of love through its poetic lyrics and soothing melody. It plays a pivotal role in Anjaan, illustrating the romantic bond between the protagonists. The heartfelt expressions conveyed by Benny Dayal and Shweta Pandit evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. This enchanting duet is perfect for moments of reflection and romance, making it a timeless piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kan Jaadai from Anjaan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Benny Dayal and Shweta Pandit, paired with Yuvan's captivating music, this song creates an unforgettable romantic atmosphere. Dive into the lyrical magic crafted by Viveka, making it a must-listen for all music lovers!
stanzaMeanings: One eye's glance makes the heart flutter. This love that cannot be separated makes me feel like a cloud.
The cloud that goes in the sky, I looked at it in awe. The embrace of life is the magic she creates.
I thought the sky would be above my head. I forgot the truth when my sky stood still.
I gathered all my desires. Your eyes are like a trap. If your gaze comes, I will be caught in a moment.
Still, I need to hold your hands for a long journey. Love is just that; it makes life meaningful until the end.
Like a continuous story, this evening is coming to an end. Your eyes are not looking at me, and my morning is fading away.
Every day for seven days, without you, it feels like there’s no sky. Seeing you, all the colors turn black and white.
In the garden of life, your beauty blooms like a flower. Love can happen, but if you see me first, it will be a trap.
One eye's glance makes the heart flutter. This love that cannot be separated makes me feel like a cloud.
The cloud that goes in the sky, I looked at it in awe. The embrace of life is the magic she creates.
